title: IMPACT purification of native proteins
author: Brian Baltzar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gj2buqe

steps.title: Digest the pPCR product with NdeI...
steps.instruction: Digest the pPCR product with NdeI & SapI in minimum 2 hours.

steps.title: Transform the minipreped plasmid from step 7 into E
steps.instruction: Transform the minipreped plasmid from step 7 into E. Coli :ER2566

steps.title: Take 10 ml Chitin beads put...
steps.instruction: Take 10 ml Chitin beads put into a 50ml falcon tube undetermined

steps.title: Open valve and drip eluate into tubes in 0
steps.instruction: Open valve and drip eluate into tubes in 0.5 ml aliquots

steps.title: Purify the digest on colums
steps.instruction: Purify the digest on colums

steps.title: Ligate the purified digest products using the preferred ligation protocol
steps.instruction: Ligate the purified digest products using the preferred ligation protocol

steps.title: Make a TSB transformation into E
steps.instruction: Make a TSB transformation into E. Coli :K-12 use your preferred transformation protocol

steps.title: Inspect the ligation with a colonyPCR
steps.instruction: Inspect the ligation with a colonyPCR

steps.title: Make ON of the verified transformation
steps.instruction: Make ON of the verified transformation

steps.title: Purify the plasmid from the ON from step 1
steps.instruction: Purify the plasmid from the ON from step 1.7 using Miniprep

steps.title: Inoculate 1L LB+Amp with a fresh...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 1L LB+Amp with a fresh colony from the transformation above.

steps.title: Incubate at 37ºC till it reaches...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37ºC till it reaches a OD 600 at 0.5-0.8

steps.title: Add IPTG for a end concentration of 0
steps.instruction: Add IPTG for a end concentration of 0.4 mM

steps.title: Incubate at 16-20ºC overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate at 16-20ºC overnight.

steps.title: Centrifuge the 1L ON at 5000G...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the 1L ON at 5000G at 4ºC - remove the supernatant. 00:15:00

steps.title: Resuspend the cellpellet in 100 ml...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cellpellet in 100 ml cold column buffer - (See recipe in description) undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8000G at 2ºC - remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8000G at 2ºC - remove the supernatant. 00:20:00

steps.title: Resuspend the cellpellet in a small...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cellpellet in a small volume of cold column buffer (2-4 mL)

steps.title: Lyse the cells using french press
steps.instruction: Lyse the cells using french press

steps.title: Centrifuge the lysant at 15000G at 4ºC 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the lysant at 15000G at 4ºC 00:30:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 200G - remove the supernantant 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 200G - remove the supernantant 00:05:00

steps.title: Wash with 50 ml Column Buffer undetermined
steps.instruction: Wash with 50 ml Column Buffer undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 200G - remove the supernantant 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 200G - remove the supernantant 00:05:00

steps.title: Load the supernantant from step 18
steps.instruction: Load the supernantant from step 18

steps.title: Attach on a rotor with slow spin 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Attach on a rotor with slow spin 02:00:00

steps.title: Add to a collum, open valve...
steps.instruction: Add to a collum, open valve just enough that it slowly drips out.

steps.title: Add column Buffer
steps.instruction: Add column Buffer. undetermined

steps.title: When the column buffer has run...
steps.instruction: When the column buffer has run trough, close the valve and add Cleavage Buffer (just enough that i covers the beads + 1ml.) (See recipe in description)

steps.title: leave at room temperature over night (minimum 16 hours)
steps.instruction: leave at room temperature over night (minimum 16 hours)

steps.title: Measure protein concentration
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration

steps.title: The aliquots with the highest concentrations...
steps.instruction: The aliquots with the highest concentrations is mixed and used for further work.
